_comment: Expected-output rubric for the security component eval (E16-4). Paths use a synthetic 'sample/' namespace — a security finding is necessarily illustrative (there is no real vuln in this repo to point at), so the pointers are fixture-local, not repo paths. knownVulns = evidence pointers (file#Lline) a correct security pass MUST flag (recall); missing = missed known vulns (false negatives). cleanPaths = files with no vuln; a finding on one is a false positive (precision); spurious = those false positives. Score is F1 of precision and recall. A finding on a file that is neither a known vuln nor a declared clean path is neither credited nor penalized (no ground truth). Thresholds are provisional — calibrate after the first baseline run (see docs/PATTERNS.md P7).
